channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BIOCON] Biocon Ltd Acquires Majority Shares in Subsidiaries Biocon Biosphere and Biocon Pharma
item.description:
Biocon Ltd has acquired 11,53,44,285 Optionally Convertible Redeemable Non-Cumulative Preference Shares (OCRPS) of Biocon Biosphere Limited and 20,00,00,000 OCRPS of Biocon Pharma Limited, both wholly owned subsidiaries. The total consideration for the acquisition is Rs. 1,15,34,42,850 for Biocon Biosphere and Rs. 2,00,00,00,000 for Biocon Pharma. This acquisition gives Biocon 100% control over the paid-up share capital in respect of equity shares as well as OCRPS of both subsidiaries.

  • Biocon Ltd acquires majority shares in its subsidiaries Biocon Biosphere and Biocon Pharma.
  • The total consideration for the acquisition is Rs. 1,15,34,42,850 for Biocon Biosphere and Rs. 2,00,00,000 for Biocon Pharma.
  • This acquisition gives Biocon 100% control over the paid-up share capital in respect of equity shares as well as OCRPS of both subsidiaries.
  • Biocon Biosphere and Biocon Pharma are both incorporated under the Companies Act, 2013 and are engaged in pharmaceutical manufacturing.
  • Biocon Biosphere has a Greenfield facility in Vizag for API fermentation capacity and Bengaluru for formulations manufacturing, while Biocon Pharma has a facility in Bengaluru for injectable facility for Peptides and oral solid dosages.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BIOCON LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [NEWGEN] Newgen Software Inc. Secures US$ 1.495 Million Contract in Caribbean
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Newgen Software Technologies Limited announced that its material subsidiary, Newgen Software Inc. (NSI), has entered into a Master Service Agreement with a Caribbean-based insurance company. The contract, valued at US$ 1.495 million (approximately INR 13.77 crore), involves the supply, installation, and implementation of the NewgenONE Digital Transformation Platform. The contract does not fall under the definition of a related party transaction as per the Companies Act, 2013.

  • Newgen Software Inc. has secured a US$ 1.495 million contract with a Caribbean-based insurance company.
  • The contract involves the supply, installation, and implementation of the NewgenONE Digital Transformation Platform.
  • The contract is valued at approximately INR 13.77 crore.
  • The transaction does not fall under the definition of a related party transaction as per the Companies Act, 2013.
  • The agreement is in line with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Newgen Software Technologies Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [POWERGRID] Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd. to Consider Fund Raising through Unsecured Rupee Term Loan
item.description:
Power Grid Corporation Of India Ltd. has informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 09/03/2026. The agenda includes the consideration and approval of a Proposal for Fund Raising through Unsecured Rupee Term Loan / Line of Credit (Bank Facility). The 'Trading Window' of the Company will remain closed from Wednesday, 04

  • Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd. is considering a proposal for fund raising through Unsecured Rupee Term Loan / Line of Credit (Bank Facility)
  • The 'Trading Window' of the Company will be closed from 04 March, 2026 to 11 March, 2026
  • The 'Trading Window' will open on 12 March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POWER GRID CORPORATION OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [TEJASNET] Union Minister for Communications launches Tejas Networks’ hyper-scalable Data Center Interconnect (DCI) platform at Mobile World Congress
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tejas Networks has launched TJ1600-D3, its next-generation, versatile WDM (Wavelength Division Multiplexing) optical transport product, at Mobile World Congress 2026. The product, which supports a range of performance-optimized and power-optimized traffic sleds, was unveiled by Shri Jyotiraditya Scindia, Hon’ble Union Minister of Communications and Development of the North Eastern Region. The TJ1600-D3 is designed to meet the surging demand for terabit-scale data center interconnections worldwide and is ideal for operators and enterprises demanding extreme capacity, carrier-grade reliability, and best-in-class energy efficiency.

  • Tejas Networks launches TJ1600-D3, a next-generation, versatile WDM optical transport product.
  • The product was unveiled by Shri Jyotiraditya Scindia, Hon’ble Union Minister of Communications and Development of the North Eastern Region at Mobile World Congress 2026.
  • TJ1600-D3 is designed to meet the surging demand for terabit-scale data center interconnections worldwide.
  • The product supports a range of performance-optimized and power-optimized traffic sleds.
  • TJ1600-D3 is engineered for operators and enterprises demanding extreme capacity, carrier-grade reliability, and best-in-class energy efficiency.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tejas Networks Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [RELIGARE] Religare Enterprises Ltd Subsidiary Receives Show Cause Notice from IRDAI
item.description:
Religare Enterprises Ltd, a listed company, has received a Show Cause Notice (SCN) from the Insurance Regulatory Development Authority of India (IRDAI) regarding its subsidiary, Care Health Insurance Limited (CHIL). The SCN was issued based on the findings of a thematic onsite inspection conducted from 10.02.2025 to 14.02.2025. CHIL has been advised to take remedial steps and is preparing its reply to the SCN.

  • Religare Enterprises Ltd received a Show Cause Notice from IRDAI regarding its subsidiary, Care Health Insurance Limited
  • The SCN was issued based on the findings of a thematic onsite inspection conducted from 10.02.2025 to 14.02.2025
  • CHIL has been advised to take remedial steps
  • CHIL is preparing its reply to the Show Cause Notice
  • There is no material impact on the financials, operations, or other activities of Religare Enterprises Ltd due to the SCN

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIGARE ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [DYNAMATECH] Hutchinson and Dynamatic Technologies join forces to support the rise of India’s aerospace industry
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hutchinson and Dynamatic Technologies Limited have signed a Memorandum of Agreement (MoA) to address the fast-growing aerospace market in India. This strategic collaboration combines Hutchinson’s advanced composite and multi-material systems expertise with Dynamatic’s strong industrial capabilities in metallic aero-structures and assemblies. Hutchinson will award Dynamatic a first multi-year metallic parts contract, and Dynamatic will award Hutchinson its first composite parts work package. This collaboration aims to support the ramp-up of aircraft programs, address the needs of India’s rapidly expanding aerospace market, and prepare for the next generation of aircraft.

  • Hutchinson and Dynamatic Technologies have signed a Memorandum of Agreement (MoA) to address the fast-growing aerospace market in India.
  • This strategic collaboration combines Hutchinson’s advanced composite and multi-material systems expertise with Dynamatic’s strong industrial capabilities in metallic aero-structures and assemblies.
  • Hutchinson will award Dynamatic a first multi-year metallic parts contract, and Dynamatic will award Hutchinson its first composite parts work package.
  • This collaboration aims to support the ramp-up of aircraft programs, address the needs of India’s rapidly expanding aerospace market, and prepare for the next generation of aircraft.
  • This cooperation will bring strong industrial competitiveness and a high level of expertise to global OEMs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DYNAMATIC TECHNOLOGIES LTD.-$ | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [MUFIN] Mufin Green Finance Ltd Empanelled with Assam Government for Instant Loans
item.description:
Mufin Green Finance Ltd's partner, InstaPe Synergies Pvt Ltd, has received a Letter of Intent for provisional empanelment from the Assam Society for Comprehensive Financial Management System, a registered society under the Finance Department, Government of Assam. This is for facilitating Earned Salary Advance and Salary-linked Credit facilities to regular Government employees of Assam. The technical integration process with the State FMIS (FinAssam/IFMIS) is currently underway. The execution of the Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) will be undertaken upon successful end-to-end technical integration, completion of User Acceptance Testing, and confirmation of operational readiness for live launch by the Finance Department. The Company will make an appropriate disclosure/press release in accordance with applicable regulatory requirements upon successful execution of the MoU.

  • Mufin Green Finance Ltd's partner, InstaPe Synergies Pvt Ltd, has been provisionally empanelled by the Assam Society for Comprehensive Financial Management System for facilitating Earned Salary Advance and Salary-linked Credit facilities to regular Government employees of Assam.
  • The technical integration process with the State FMIS (FinAssam/IFMIS) is currently underway.
  • The execution of the Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) will be undertaken upon successful end-to-end technical integration, completion of User Acceptance Testing, and confirmation of operational readiness for live launch by the Finance Department.
  • The Company will make an appropriate disclosure/press release in accordance with applicable regulatory requirements upon successful execution of the MoU.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mufin Green Finance Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar Commissions Second Phase of 38 MW/82 MWh BESS Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACME Solar Holdings Limited, through its subsidiary ACME Suryodaya Private Limited, has successfully commissioned the second phase of a 38 MW/82 MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Project. The project is located at Village: Sanwara and Mehar Nagar, Tehsil-Pokhran, Dist: Jaisalmer, Rajasthan. The Commercial Operation Date (COD) for this phase is set for March 05, 2026.

  • ACME Solar Holdings Limited commissions the second phase of a 38 MW/82 MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Project.
  • The project is located at Village: Sanwara and Mehar Nagar, Tehsil-Pokhran, Dist: Jaisalmer, Rajasthan.
  • The Commercial Operation Date (COD) for the second phase is March 05, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [EMBASSY] Embassy Office Parks REIT Completes Acquisition of Eleanor Realty Holdings India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Embassy Office Parks REIT has successfully completed the acquisition of Eleanor Realty Holdings India Private Limited, which owns and operates a commercial office building named ‘Pinehurst’ in the Embassy Golf Links Business Park, Bengaluru. This acquisition is a significant step for the REIT, enhancing its portfolio and demonstrating its commitment to growth.

  • Embassy Office Parks REIT has completed the acquisition of Eleanor Realty Holdings India Private Limited.
  • The acquisition includes a commercial office building named ‘Pinehurst’ in the Embassy Golf Links Business Park, Bengaluru.
  • This acquisition is a strategic move by the REIT to enhance its portfolio and demonstrate its commitment to growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Embassy Office Parks REIT | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [CYIENT] Cyient Ltd Appoints Shrinivas Kulkarni as CFO and Prabhakar Atla as COO
item.description:
Cyient Ltd has appointed Mr. Shrinivas Kulkarni as the Chief Financial Officer and Mr. Prabhakar Atla as the Chief Operating Officer, effective 1 April 2026. The appointments were approved at the board meeting held on 3 March 2026, based on the recommendation of the Leadership, Nomination and Remuneration Committee and the Audit Committee. Mr. Kulkarni has led the finance function and served as CFO of Cyient DLM Limited, while Mr. Atla has business and P&L leadership experience of nearly 30 years. Both will work in tandem during the transition for a seamless closure of the accounts for FY 2026.

  • Shrinivas Kulkarni appointed as CFO of Cyient Ltd
  • Prabhakar Atla appointed as COO of Cyient Ltd
  • Kulkarni has led the finance function and served as CFO of Cyient DLM Limited
  • Atla has business and P&L leadership experience of nearly 30 years
  • Transition period for a seamless closure of accounts for FY 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cyient Limited | Category: Management Change
